rulings.Case Title: SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY VS. IKEDALINE WALKER et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Pltf'S ,Otion For Entry Of First Amended Judgment
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, January 5, 2012, line 1. Plaintiff San Francisco Housing Authority's Motion for Entry of First Amended Judgment. Grant, subject to opposition. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY VS. TRAMMESE WALKER et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Entry Of Judgment
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, January 5, 2012, line 2. Plaintiff San Francisco Housing Authority's Motion for Entry of Judgment. Grant, subject to opposition. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: DEUTSCHE BANK NATIONAL TRUST COMPANY AS TRUSTEE VS. ONYEBUCHI T. UWAKAH et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, January 5, 2012, line 3. Defendants Onyebuchi Uwakah and Ugonoma Uwakah's demurrer to complaint. Overruled with five days to answer. Defendant's counsel is ordered to comply with Local Rule of Court 2.6C in the future. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: WELLS FARGO BANK N.A. VS. PARVANEH ALIZADEH et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, January 5, 2012, line 4. Defendant Parvahneh Alizadeh's demurrer to 1st Amended Complaint. Sustain with five day leave to amend for plaintiff to allege defendant's capacity as former owner, tenant, etc. Defendant's counsel is ordered to comply with Local Rule of Court 2.6C in the future. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: EDWARD BREYBURG VS. DAVID ELLENBERG et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, January 5, 2012, line 5. Defendants David Ellenburg and Chautemoc Andrade's demurrer to 1st amended complaint. Sustain with five day leave to amend. Uncertainty as to standing of Edward; Ludmila identified as landlord and or owner by lease. Defendant's counsel is ordered to comply with Local Rule of Court 2.6C in the future. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: JACK LEE FONG VS. PETER NAJI et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, January 5, 2012, line 6. Defendant Pete Naji's demurrer to 1st amended complaint. Sustain without leave to amend. Defective notice because limits payment method. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: 709 GEARY LLC VS. MARIBELLE CERVANTES et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, January 5, 2012, line 7. Defendant Maribelle Cervantes' demurrer to complaint. Off calendar, case dismissed 12/12/11. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: PAZ CABANSAGAN VS. ERVIN FERNANDEZ et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, January 5, 2012, line 8. Defendant Ervin Fernandez's demurrer to complaint. Sustain with leave to amend to comply with CCP 1166(d)(1)(A) and to allege compliance exemption from San Francisco Rent Ordinance. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: LEONARD GAGE VS. ANTHONY A JACQUES et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, January 5, 2012, line 9. Defendant Anthony Jean Jeacques' motion to set aside default/default judgment/leave to defend. Grant, on condition answer be filed forthwith and defendant post rent for month of December, 2011 with the court. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: SHARON DRUMMOND et al VS. DAVID JACKSON et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion To Quash Service
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, January 5, 2012, line 10. Defendants David Jackson and Bonnie O'Brien's Motion to Quash Service. Grant. Plaintiff may not file an amended complaint. = (501/REQ)
